name: Holiday Bourbon Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the powdered sugar, cocoa powder, crushed graham cracker crumbs, lemon zest, and orange zest.
2. Add 1/2 of the pecans to the mixture and blend until well combined.
3. Gradually add the liquids (corn syrup and bourbon) and continue mixing until a dough forms.
4. Roll the dough into small balls and coat them with the remaining powdered sugar and pecan mixture.
5. Store the finished Bourbon Balls in a tightly covered container at room temperature for up to 1 week.
